summary: Ghost Estate Auto-Cleanup feature fully tested. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend GhostEstateAlert component verified with all required UI elements working: expandable list, checkboxes, select all toggle, password input, and Clean Up button. The feature correctly detects ghost estates (29 found) and provides batch cleanup functionality with admin password confirmation.
critical_code_review_comments: Lines 653-721 admin.py: cleanup-ghost-estates endpoint correctly validates admin password, batch deletes estates and associated data, resets is_also_benefactor when no remaining estates
Lines 1500-1522 admin.py: ghost estate detection correctly identifies 3 types - orphaned owners, incomplete beneficiary conversions, empty estates
Lines 252-386 EstateHealthTab.js: GhostEstateAlert component has all required UI elements with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Line 261 EstateHealthTab.js: selected state initialized with all ghost estates selected by default - good UX for quick cleanup

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements working: expandable list, checkboxes, select all, password input, cleanup button)

seed_data_creation: None - 29 ghost estates already exist in database from previous test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ghost estate auto-cleanup feature verified. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_ghost_estate_cleanup.py cover: ghost_estates array in estate-health response, ghost count in summary, ghost estate structure validation, cleanup endpoint auth/password validation, cleanup response structure, and integration test with real ghost estate. Frontend UI verified: GhostEstateAlert component at top of Estate Health tab, expandable ghost list with 29 items, checkboxes with select/deselect all, password input, Clean Up button shows count (29). All ghost estates currently show 'Empty estate with no beneficiaries' as reason.
